# Physics Courses — physicscourses.co.uk

Online A-level Physics revision and exam preparation courses. Small groups. Taught by Dr Anthony Korte (Oxford First, UCL MSc, Imperial College PhD).

## What this site covers

- Intensive online A-level Physics revision courses
- Easter, Christmas and summer intensives
- Small group tuition via Zoom
- All major UK exam boards: AQA, OCR A, OCR B, Edexcel, WJEC Eduqas
- Year 12 and Year 13

## Tutor

Dr Anthony Korte — First Class degree in Physics (University of Oxford), MSc with Distinction in Mathematical Modelling (UCL), PhD in Theoretical Physics (Imperial College London). Member of the Institute of Physics.

## Booking

Full course details, dates and booking at https://physicsandmathscourses.com

## Related sites

- A-level Maths courses: https://alevelmathsonline.co.uk
- ESAT and Oxford PAT preparation: https://oxfordpat.co.uk
